title: He Built an AI Audience Simulator. It’s the Future of Customer Research. - Ep. 49 with Michael Taylor
title_zh: 他构建了一个AI受众模拟器。这是客户研究的未来。-第49集与迈克尔·泰勒
full_text: Michael Taylor has perfected the art of getting AI to speak in tongues. He’s taught it to mimic the voices of your customers—so you can see how they would respond before you ship.Michael is the creator of Rally, a market research tool that lets you simulate an audience of AI personas. He built a simulator that lets us A/B test Every’s headlines on an audience that mimics the real Hacker News audience. It’s become a part of my writing workflow, and I love it because you test your assumptions quic

# He Built an AI Audience Simulator. It’s the Future of Customer Research. - Ep. 49 with Michael Taylor

- raw_id: R-099
- title_zh: 他构建了一个AI受众模拟器。这是客户研究的未来。-第49集与迈克尔·泰勒
- title_translation_status: translated
- title_translation_method: mymemory_title_translation
- original_url: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/how-do-you-use-chat-gpt/episodes/He-Built-an-AI-Audience-Simulator--Its-the-Future-of-Customer-Research----Ep--49-with-Michael-Taylor-e2vcucq
- source_name: AI & I by Every
- collected_at: 2026-07-12T09:55:59.201Z

## clean_text

Michael Taylor has perfected the art of getting AI to speak in tongues. He’s taught it to mimic the voices of your customers—so you can see how they would respond before you ship.Michael is the creator of Rally, a market research tool that lets you simulate an audience of AI personas. He built a simulator that lets us A/B test Every’s headlines on an audience that mimics the real Hacker News audience. It’s become a part of my writing workflow, and I love it because you test your assumptions quic
